title: dracocephalum incanum
intro: Dracocephalum incanum, also known as white dragon or white toadflax, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of D. incanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Dracocephalum incanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various ailments.
